channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. Must Take Strong Action Against Huawei to Maintain AI Lead
item.description: The United States currently leads in AI, but that edge could vanish without decisive measures.

item.title: The Harsh Reality of Abortion Pills
item.description: These pills represent a dangerous departure from proper medical care.

item.title: Thomas Massie Should Be Voted Out
item.description: Voters in his district ought to retire the conspiracy theorist from politics.

item.title: Iran Under Terrorist Control: What Comes Next?
item.description: Nations that label the IRGC as terrorist still look away, and this inaction has serious repercussions.
